payload.answer: There is a possible status transition conflict: the existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new memory says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. Safe actions available: approve_supersession if the new implemented MVP status should replace the older planned/open status; keep_both if both statements should remain because they refer to different scopes or both are still useful; reject_new if the new statement is incorrect or should not be saved; edit if the new memory needs clarification before saving, such as distinguishing the full Slack agent from the MVP.
